# batch-update-repo-descriptions
Description: Batch updates repository descriptions from a provided list, allowing for specific overrides or exclusions for individual repositories.
Source: project
1. Gather the list of repositories and their corresponding proposed descriptions.
2. Identify any repositories that require special handling, such as specific description modifications or complete exclusion from the update process.
3. Remove any excluded repositories from the update queue.
4. Apply any specified description tweaks to individual repositories as needed.
5. Prepare a single batch operation to update the descriptions for all remaining repositories.
6. Execute the batch update.
7. Verify the successful application of the new descriptions.
8. Provide a summary report detailing the outcome of the batch update, including any special handling applied.
